task: Create graph-native representation of the M-17 Engineering Bridge v2.1 pipeline output (run 2026-03-06T01-06-52). Read the manifest to get task metadata. For each of the 13 tasks, create a Seed node with seedType pipeline-output using createPipelineOutputSeed from src/graph/queries.ts. Create a Bloom node for the run, link Seeds via CONTAINS relationships using linkSeedToPipelineRun. Use MERGE for idempotency. All graph writes must be non-fatal (try/catch with console.warn). TypeScript only, use existing graph client writeTransaction.
